infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tensr uses your location to record outdoor runs and walks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Tensr uses your location in the background to continue recording outdoor sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Tensr uses your location in the background to continue recording outdoor sessions.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Tensr uses motion data to improve the accuracy of outdoor session tracking.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow TENSR to access your location during workouts.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TENSR to access your location in the background so outdoor runs and walks keep tracking when your phone is locked or you switch apps.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TENSR to access your camera to scan food barcodes.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Tensr reads your heart rate to show workout analytics and training insights.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Tensr can write workouts you log to Apple Health (optional).
